text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Ines! Been a minute! Guess you're back to your
old shift schedule.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, yeah, sorry! I hope this place wasn't too
short-staffed without me?

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
No wayyy! I'm happy you took that time off! I was
worried you were literally going to work till you
dropped.

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text:
Lemme know if you ever need me to cover a shift.
Y'know, like, when you have practice and stuff.
Oh, and any time you feel like working, you're
welcome to my shifts too.

text_block_list.name: Flashy Part-Timer
text_block_list.text: I wanna do anything I can to help you out.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
"I've already adjusted your shift schedule for
March. Make sure you rest up after the Osaka
Hai."

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: "Watching you run gives us hope, Ines."

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
First my coworker and now my boss... Everyone's
getting ahead of themselves trying to
accommodate me.
choice_data_list: That's because they're dreaming through you.
That's because they're dreaming through you.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Aha. C'mon, all this talk of hopes and dreams is a
little much, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I do want to be able to pay them back for all their
support, you know?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, keep those expectations high! I'll take
them with me to the track!
